title: This company killed open source
summary: Alberta Tech discusses Malus, a company or service that the video frames as potentially ending open source. The video covers how Malus works, its impact on open source maintainers, and debates whether the company is acting unethically. Chapters range from defining open source concepts to examining Malus's role in the ecosystem.
